message:
fix(engine): correct 8 logic and safety bugs across engine and extension-host

containment_executor: inverted cooperative flag — Terminate and
Quarantine actions were incorrectly marked cooperative (matches! should
have been !matches!), allowing containment to proceed cooperatively when
it must be forceful.

capability_witness: Wilson confidence interval calculation used wrong
scaling factor (z2_over_n squared instead of z2_over_n * 1_000_000),
producing incorrect confidence bounds. Also strips promotion_theorem
metadata and PolicyTheoremCheck proof obligations from synthesis
unsigned bytes to prevent signature invalidation on policy updates.

forensic_replayer: Terminate and Quarantine actions now also apply to
cells in Suspended state, not just is_alive(). A suspended cell that
needs forced termination was previously unreachable.

self_replacement: PromotionDecision now returns Inconclusive when
gate_results is empty instead of Approved. An empty gate set means no
evidence was collected, not that all gates passed.

reputation: transitive dependents now actually get their trust degraded
during revocation propagation. Previously the transitive dependency walk
only tracked IDs but never called transition_trust() on them.

test262_release_gate: strip_comment() now respects quoted strings,
preventing '#' characters inside string literals from being treated as
comment markers and silently truncating test directives.

control_plane_benchmark_split_gate: throughput_regression_millionths and
latency_regression_millionths now use u128 intermediate arithmetic to
prevent silent overflow on large benchmark values.

franken-extension-host: three fixes — (1) manifest validation now checks
min_engine_version length in addition to version, (2) Terminate/
Quarantine/Finalize transitions no longer require a manifest (only
Validate needs one), (3) fixed copy-paste bug where policy_id was passed
as the trace reference argument in CapabilityEscrowGateway.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
